sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_partitioned (a String, b UInt32, c UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY a ORDER BY (b);

INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION gcs('http://bucket.amazonaws.com/my_bucket/file_{_partition_id}.csv', 'CSV', 'a String, b UInt32, c UInt32') PARTITION BY a VALUES ('apple', 1, 10), ('banana', 2, 20), ('apple', 3, 30);
UPDATE test_partitioned SET b = 5 WHERE a = 'banana';
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION gcs('http://bucket.amazonaws.com/my_bucket_{_partition_id}/file.csv', 'CSV', 'a String, b UInt32, c UInt32') PARTITION BY a VALUES ('cherry', 4, 40), ('date', 5, 50);
